calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Raymond Fong And Chloe Mosqueda In Support Thereof [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Sep-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raymond Fong, of the Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415.553.1752, for petitioners;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raymond Fong, Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415.551.9583, for petitioners;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted, no opposition. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
